calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendants Luz E. Cisneros & Jose Cruz

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; Matter not reported

Douglas Wallace, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff US Bank National Association.
No appearance by Defendants Luz Cisneros and Jose Cruz.

The court reviews the filed documents as evidence submitted by Mr. Wallace.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff US Bank National Association, and against Defendants Luz Cisneros and Jose Cruz

Plaintiff US Bank National Association is awarded judgment against Defendants Luz Cisneros and Jose Cruz as follows:

Damages/Principal: $8,004.64
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Costs: $370.22

Total Judgment: $8374.86

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Law Office of Timothy Reed, Timothy Reed Esq.'s Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for DEFENDANTs LUZ CISNEROS, and JOSE CRUZ.

Plaintiffs' attorney's Motion with Withdraw as Attorney of Record is GRANTED.

The court signs two orders.

Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CM)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

The Court's tentative ruling is hearing required. There being no appearances in Open Court at 9:18am the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs LUZ CISNEROS,and JOSE CRUZ, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

The unopposed motion by Counsel Timothy Reed and Law Office of Timothy Reed, counsel for Defendants Luz Cisneros and Jose Cruz, to be relieved as counsel is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-05-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
